title: Ubiquiti UACC-G4 Doorbell Pro PoE-Gang Box, white
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / Videophones and bells / Door Bells
description: Secure, flat or angled mounting plate for installing the G4 Doorbell Pro PoE over a standard single-gang box. Allows secure installation on both old-work and new-work single-gang boxes. Includes flat and 25° angled wedge mounting options Compatible with G4 Doorbell Pro PoE
